subcodes.first_line: O Solomon! The seal that was once in thy possession hath fallen into the hands of a demon, and now its sovereign lieth captive in the clutches of the world's fiends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا سلیمان از قبل خاتم او بدست دیو آمد حال مالک او دست دیوان عالم مبتلا در
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
